en.extract:
The Bougainville honeyeater (Stresemannia bougainvillei) is a species of bird in the family Meliphagidae. It is monotypic within the genus Stresemannia.
It is endemic to Bougainville Island.  Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests.

The '''Bougainville honeyeater''' ('''''Stresemannia bougainvillei''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Meliphagidae]]. It is [[monotypic]] within the genus '''''Stresemannia'''''.<ref name = "ITIS"/>
It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Bougainville Island]].  Its natural [[habitat]]s are subtropical or tropical moist lowland [[forest]]s and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]]s.<ref name="iucn status 11 November 2021" />
